content.text:
I've opened the EmployeeMetrics layout area for you. 

To analyze employees by territory (similar to the "Top Employees of the Month" report) I can also display one or more of these territory-focused views:
- RegionalAnalysis — sales by region (Eastern/Western/Northern/Southern) to link employees to regional performance
- TopEmployeesByRevenue or TopEmployees — employee rankings by revenue (can be filtered by territory)
- TopEmployeesTable or TopEmployeesReport — detailed tables/reports you can use to compare amounts earned by territory and month
- TopEmployeesByRevenue + RegionalAnalysis side-by-side — territory leaderboards and regional contribution

Tell me:
- Which year (2024 or 2025) or “All years” to use?
- Do you want a monthly view (specific month), a month-by-month trend, or a summary for the period?
- Any specific region(s) or employees to focus on?

I’ll display the requested layout area(s) next.
